module.name: protocol
module.purpose: Owns shared protocol contracts and namespace re-exports. Direct files define the SessionMessage network envelope and re-export typed tool schemas (ToolSchema, ToolInputSchema, ToolOutputSchema), while tool protocol models live in the tool child module; task IDs/events live in task child modules, ExeId and ExecutionRequest live in execution child files, and SessionEvent lives in session/event.rs with Task, Step(StepSignature, StepEvent), and Execution variants. TaskSignature::new allocates fresh TaskIds, ExecutionSignature::new preserves caller TaskIds while allocating ExeIds, and StepSignature::new preserves caller TaskSignatures for step creation.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns task protocol contracts including TaskSignature::new(name), which allocates a fresh TaskId for new tasks.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns step protocol contracts including StepSignature::new(task, step_no, name, kind), which preserves the provided TaskSignature.

childModules.name: execution
childModules.purpose: Owns execution protocol contracts including ExecutionSignature::new(task_id, name), which preserves the provided TaskId and allocates a fresh ExeId.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns the SessionEvent protocol enum in event.rs with Task, Step(StepSignature, StepEvent), and Execution variants; mod.rs is namespace and re-export wiring only.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Owns tool protocol metadata contracts split into ToolSchema, ToolInputSchema, ToolOutputSchema, and ToolPreview models with JSON conversion helpers.
